Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Of Specially Appearing Deft'S To Dismiss, Or To Quash Service Of Summons, For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction And Appendix Of Non-California Authorities Cited
Off Calendar Apr-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stephen Caine, Esq. of Haight, Brown & Bonesteel, 310-215-7100 for defendant and moving party Faygo Beverages, Inc.
Laralei Paras, Esq. of Hirst & Chandler, 510-848-8880 for plaintiff and opposing party Russell Brimer.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT FAYGO BEVERAGES, INC.'S Notice Of Motion Of Specially Appearing Defendant's To Dismiss, Or To Quash Service Of Summons, For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction And Appendix Of Non-California Authorities Cited is granted. Neither general or specificity exists.
Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
